Contact

Questions, corrections, source suggestions, and privacy requests.

General: hello@segurotools.com

Spanish support: hola@segurotools.com

Support: support@segurotools.com

Calculators: calculators@segurotools.com

Editorial: editorial@segurotools.com

Corrections: corrections@segurotools.com

Source suggestions: sources@segurotools.com

Research: research@segurotools.com

Privacy requests: privacy@segurotools.com

Legal notices: legal@segurotools.com

Advertising: ads@segurotools.com

Partnerships: partners@segurotools.com

Role inboxes are centrally monitored so requests can be routed by topic without implying a separate person for every address.

SeguroTools

Insurance calculators and plain-English guides for U.S. households.

Educational estimate only. This site does not sell insurance, negotiate coverage, or provide legal, tax, financial, or insurance advice.
